Critical interactions have not been acknowledged.
Interactions have not been checked.
The Ingredient Does Not Match the Product Batches
There should be destinations provided
The Compound must be provided
The credited quantity cannot be negative
The credited Compound quantity cannot be fractional
The credited quantity cannot be greater than the dispensed quantity.
At least one credit item is required.
The login credentials are incorrect.
Authentication is required by the process
Dispense items should be captured
Dispense request items should be captured
Compound Name is Required
Compound Name is a duplicate
The Method is Required
The Directions are Required
Shelf Life is Required
Quantity is Required
Unit Of Measure is Required
Reference is Required
Packaging is Required
There must be at least 2 components
DispensingEventItems can't be empty
You cant create a duplicate Prescription Abbreviation
Items need to be completed for the copy medication process
Days supply is recommended for dispensed antibiotics.
The alerts have not been acknowledge

Duplicate dispensing event items
Duplicate batch catpture items
Duplicate compound ingredients

An item has been dispensed with a quantity in excess of the outstanding quantity.
An item has missing fields

To Follow ingredients don't match the batches captured
Compounding quantity is more than requested quantity
The Name is Required
The Surname is Required
The Initials are Required
The Title is Required

The Gender is Required
The DateOfBirth is Required
The Total Price dispensed exceeds the TTO Limit
The Days supply exceeds the TTO Limit
The Dispensed Exceeds Prescribed
The Compound is not active in the stock room
The Quote for the medication must be retreived from Imeds
Items with a schedule status above 2 require a prescription
If the payment method is account and account must be selected
If the payment method is account the selected account must have sufficient credit
If a valid prescription is being dispensed against the practitioner must be specified
If a To Follow item has Quantity then Batch Number and Expiry Date must be specified
If a To Follow item has Quantity, Batch Number and Expiry Date then Pack Size must be specified
If a user tried to create an account that already exists

validations.conditions: context != null && context.CreditItems != null | (item is CreditAdhocMixture || item is CreditRecipeMixture
context != null && context.CreditItems != null | item.CreditQuantity > item.DispensedQuantity

validations.summary: /// Validates the specified context. ///

validations.conditions: context.DispensingEventItems != null && context.DispensingEventItems.Count > 0 | duplicateProductPackages.Count > 0 | duplicateRecipes.Count > 0 | duplicateAdHocMixtures.Count > 0
context.DispensingEventItems != null && context.DispensingEventItems.Count > 0 | eventRecipeMixtures.Count > 0 | mixture != null && mixture.Directions == recipeMixture.Directions

context.PaymentType == PaymentTypeCodeData.Account && context.SelectedAccount != null && context.QuoteDetails != null | context.SelectedAccount.AccountLimit.HasValue | availableCredit < context.QuoteDetails.AmountDue

validations.summary: /// Validates the specified context. ///

validations.conditions: context.DispensingEventItems != null && context.DispensingEventItems.Count > 0 | duplicateProductPackages.Count > 0 | duplicateRecipes.Count > 0 | duplicateAdHocMixtures.Count > 0

context.PreviousDispensingEventItems != null && context.PreviousDispensingEventItems.Count > 0 && context.SelectedDispensingEventReasonId == null | item != null && ((eventItemSR.Quantity + eventItemSR.Quantity * 0.1M | recipeMixture != null && ((eventItemSR.Quantity + eventItemSR.Quantity * 0.1M

context.DispensingEventType != DispensingEventTypeCodeData.EmercencyCupboard && context.DispensingEventType != DispensingEventTypeCodeData.SurgicalStock && (context.DispensingEventItems != null && context.DispensingEventItems.Count > 0 | eventRecipeMixtures.Count > 0 | mixture != null && mixture.Directions == recipeMixture.Directions

validations.summary: /// Validates the specified context. ///

validations.conditions: context.Items != null && context.Items.Count > 0 | eventRecipeMixtures.Count > 0 | mixture != null && mixture.Directions == recipeMixture.Directions
context.Items != null && context.Items.Count > 0 | duplicateProductPackages.Count > 0 | duplicateRecipes.Count > 0 | duplicateAdHocMixtures.Count > 0
